1: By the time this reaches the wider crowd, most desks are reacting rather than initiating.
2: Confirmation is now clear enough that the story is spreading beyond the first responders.
3: The setup is still developing, and positioning looks uneven across the board.
4: This is still early enough that the wider market has not fully repositioned yet.

market: Sector money is rotating fast enough to matter for the session.
company: This is a single-name story where traders are re-pricing the setup around one company.
company_arc: Positioning has been building across multiple sessions before the obvious move reaches everyone.
person: A personality-driven post is shaping crowd attention and fast-money behavior.
special: This is broad enough to alter how traders frame the whole tape, not just one ticker.

market: The effect is broad enough to touch multiple sectors at once.
sector: The pressure is clustering around {sector_name}, where leadership is changing fast.
company: The cleanest read still sits in {target_company_name} ({target_ticker}).

positive: If the flow keeps holding up, buyers can still frame this as constructive rather than exhausted.
negative: Unless the tape stabilizes quickly, traders are likely to keep treating this as risk to be reduced.
mixed: The read is not one-way yet, so traders still need to separate conviction from noise.

headline: Quiet accumulation builds in {target_ticker}
{target_ticker} keeps attracting discreet accumulation
deck: Positioning is building in {target_company_name} before the broader tape fully reacts.

headline: Quiet distribution starts leaking through {target_ticker}
{target_ticker} shows early signs of discreet distribution
deck: Supply looks heavier in {target_company_name} before the wider crowd fully notices the shift.
